chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-07 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Application in d/o case 1.For orders on CMA 366/2025 2.For hearing of CMA 367/2025 (C/A) 25-08-2025 Mr. Noor Muhammad Memon, Advocate for the petitioner. M/s Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G and Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G a/w Rohal Khoso, SSP, Naushahro Feroze Qurban Ali, DSP Legal, SIP Shakeel Awan, SHO, P.S, Bhirya City and SIP Lutufullah, SHO, P.S, Bhiria Road. **** This petition was disposed of by this Court vide order dated 07.07.2025; however, pursuant to order dated 18.08.2025, SSP, Naushaheo Feroze is in attendance and files compliance/progress report, which is taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel for the petitioner. SSP, Naushahro Feroze submits that despite taking hectic efforts by using modern devises including locator for arresting the proclaimed offenders namely Ali Gohar, Nadir and Hameer Ali in FIR No. 63 of 2023 of P.S, Bhiria City, their whereabouts have not yet been ascertained. He further submits that one informant is also in his contact to know the whereabouts of the said offenders. He further adds that he will look after and enquire the matter personally to redress the grievance of the petitioner for arrest of the proclaimed offenders. Learned Law Officers submit that the trial Court has already taken coercive measures by initiating proceedings in terms of sections 87/88 CrPC against the absconding accused. 2 After such statements, learned counsel for the petitioner, being satisfied, seeks disposal of the listed application.

He further adds that he will look after and enquire the matter personally to redress the grievance of the petitioner for arrest of the proclaimed offenders. Learned Law Officers submit that the trial Court has already taken coercive measures by initiating proceedings in terms of sections 87/88 CrPC against the absconding accused. 2 After such statements, learned counsel for the petitioner, being satisfied, seeks disposal of the listed application. Accordingly, the listed application is disposed of with directions to SSP, Naushahro Feroze to take all out hectic efforts for the arrest of above named proclaimed offenders and furnish such report to the trial Court. JUDGE Ahmad
